title: Richly Roasted Norwegian Lamb Kebabs
description: A salty and shaggy Norwegian dish featuring pomegranate, this recipe is perfect for a special occasion, served on a tagliere vessel and prepared using a bain-marie for halal-friendly cooking.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 400 degrees Fahrenheit.
Thread the lamb cubes onto skewers, leaving a small space between each piece.
Place the skewers in a bain-marie and roast in the oven for 20 minutes.
Meanwhile, mix the pomegranate molasses, olive oil, garlic, salt, and black pepper in a bowl.
Brush the mixture onto the lamb kebabs after 20 minutes of roasting.
Continue roasting for an additional 15 minutes, or until the lamb is cooked to 145 degrees Fahrenheit.
Remove the kebabs from the oven and garnish with pomegranate seeds and parsley.
Serve the kebabs on a tagliere vessel immediately.
